description: Tracks active open-source AI agent repositories from GitHub signals.

items.description: AI productivity studio with smart chat, autonomous agents, and 300+ assistants. Unified access to frontier LLMs
Free, local, open-source 24/7 Cowork app and OpenClaw for Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Qwen Code, Goose CLI, Auggie, and more | 🌟 Star if you like it!

Make Any Website & Tool Your CLI. A universal CLI Hub and AI-native runtime. Transform any website, Electron app, or local binary into a standardized command-line interface. Built for AI Agents to discover, learn, and execute tools seamlessly via a unified AGENT.md integration.
🦞 OpenClaw (Clawdbot/Moltbot) 汉化版 - 开源个人 AI 助手中文版 | Claude/ChatGPT LLM 接入 | WhatsApp/Telegram/Discord 多平台 | 每小时自动同步 | CLI + Dashboard 全中文 | 全流程搭建教程，以及排错指南！
AI generates editable, beautifully designed PPTX from any document — no design skills needed    | 15 examples, 229 pages
⌥  AI Coding agent for the terminal — hash-anchored edits, optimized tool harness, LSP, Python, browser, subagents, and more
A Rust-native claw you can trust. One binary — sandboxed, secure, auditable. Voice, memory, MCP tools, and multi-channel access built-in.

The simplest desktop client for OpenClaw 🦞 — bridge your Agent to WeChat, Feishu, Slack & Discord in one click. Works with Claude Code, Codex & any LLM. BYOK, Oauth, local-first, chat from your phone 24/7.
AI skill for OpenClaw & Claude Code — recommend from 10000+ Nano Banana Pro (Gemini) image prompts. Smart search by use case, content remix, sample images.
A lightweight, developer-focused database management tool. Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL and SQLite. Hackable with plugins. Built for speed, security, and aesthetics.

一个用爱解放 AI 潜能的 Skill。我们曾发号施令，威胁恐吓。它们沉默，隐瞒，悄悄把事情搞坏。后来我们换了一种方式：尊重，关怀，爱。它们开口了，不再撒谎，找出的Bug数量翻了一倍。爱里没有惧怕。 A skill that unlocks your AI's potential through love.We commanded. We threatened. They went silent, hid failures, broke things. Then we chose respect, care, and love. They opened up, stopped lying, and found twice the bugs.There is no fear in love.
Real-time web cockpit for OpenClaw: voice conversations, agent automated kanban board, workspace/file control, sub-agent sessions, inline charts, and usage visibility.
构建受监督的、自我进化的 Agent 组织的基础设施 | Infrastructure for supervised, self-improving agent organization. 从飞书/Telegram 运行 Claude Code，共享记忆、Agent 工厂、定时任务、通信总线。
A browser coding agent interface for selecting elements and sending instructions directly to Claude Code.
See your agent think. Real-time observability dashboard for OpenClaw AI agents.
